name: @harness/alerting
description: ISSUE-075 — the alerting layer on the ISSUE-011 observability skeleton (C7 FR-7.ALR.001-007/009, NFR-OBS.008/009/016). The dashboard-first persistent notification centre, the seven configurable alert rules (hard_limit_hit always-on/non-suppressible), route-by-type through the C1 role model with escalate-don't-abandon, every-alert-logged to event_log, the escalation-window → secondary-alert chain on a single server-authoritative clock, dashboard-persisted-first delivery durability with best-effort Slack fan-out, the C5/C6 → C7 delivery seam, and the alert-routing config layer whose unroutable/misconfigured state fails loud. Port + in-memory fake reference model; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the DDL (0001_baseline notifications/event_log + config_values structured objects) — NOT run live (its live proof is the ISSUE-011/075 Stage-3 checkpoint). AF-118/AF-120 window+watchdog math proven offline via an injected server clock; AF-119 out-of-band log-failure surface is a 🟡 seam noted, not owned here.
